summary: Package-level keyMap struct and keys variable defining 18 key bindings for TUI navigation, view switching, and operations
notes: Core configuration for all keyboard interactions. Defines 18 key bindings: navigation (Up/Down/Left/Right), view control (Quit/Tab/Help), operations (Refresh/Summarize/Filter/Add/Delete), and expand/collapse (ExpandAll/CollapseAll). Stateless — pure key binding configuration. Each binding includes key triggers and help text (e.g., Quit maps to 'q' and 'ctrl+c', Up maps to 'up' and 'k').
